$comment: Project hooks for hello-code. The hooks-engine spawns each command as a subprocess with a restricted env (no API keys, no AWS_*, no GH_*) on the matching lifecycle event, writes the event payload as JSON to stdin, and expects a JSON HookDecision back on stdout. The pre-tool hook below is a belt-and-suspenders backstop for the permission rules: if a Bash invocation somehow slips past the allowlist, the hook denies it before it runs. See factory/packages/hooks-engine/src/index.ts for the full event list and payload shape.
